title: Ancient Structures: Edo Japan
description: A Japanese structure pack mod for the Ancient Structures serie
body:
![Edo Project Banner](https://i.imgur.com/ERZIPOr.jpg) ## 🏯 About Edo Japan This mod adds various lone structures inspired from the Edo Period (1603 AD to 1868 AD). Which means you can have your samurai meet a cowboy and it be historically accurate. These additional builds follow the core goals of Ancient Structure by enriching survival gameplay, worldbuilding, atmosphere, and challenges giving the player a chance to find hidden loot and other surprises. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## About Ancient Structures [Ancient Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancient-structures) is a full-featured Minecraft mod that adds cultural, handcrafted structures from ancient civilizations directly into your world. It serves as a bridge within the Dawn of Time ecosystem, showcasing the architectural potential of Dawn of Time blocks and the animated armor models from Armor of the Ages through immersive world generation. The experience can be extended via the other structure mods from the Dawn of Time team. These packs are focused on a single culture to allow you to discover even more about architecture. Each pack is unique and reflects the team member style! * **[Knoxxturre](https://modrinth.com/user/Knoxxturre) :** Edo Japan * **[Jackiefr](https://modrinth.com/user/Jackiefr):** Chinese
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Dependencies This datapack requires the following mods: * [Dawn of Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/dawn-of-time) * [Armor of the Ages](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-of-the-ages) * [Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) * [YetAnotherConfig (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) * [Redden's Stone Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/mod/reddens-stone-lanterns) ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Biome Compatibility ### Currently Supported: * Vanilla ### Planned: * Regions Unexplored * Oh The Biomes We've Gone * Biomes O'Plenty * Terralith ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## What's Next? We’re planning to expand the datapack with: * Decorative buildings * Useful survival structures * Dungeons * Trail chambers * Biome Support New releases are coming soon — stay tuned! ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Our Mods Ecosystem
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Credits * **Knoxxturre** - Provided all the structures * **TheGoldenWorld** – Provided the code
